violations.text: The kitchen does not have a hand-washing sink that is conveniently located and/or readily accessible. Hand-washing sinks must be located to allow convenient use by employees in food preparation, food dispensing, and ware-washing areas. Establishment must install a hand sink in the back kitchen. New Violation. Correct By: 08/26/2024

The cutting boards in the kitchen prep area are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 08/26/2024

The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quat sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink. Establishment is lacking drain plugs. Establishment must get test strips and drain plugs for 3-bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 08/26/2024

The following non-food contact surfaces have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Refrigerators, scale base, table tops, and wall behind grill line. Non-food contact surfaces must be cleaned to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 08/26/2024

The establishment is lacking outside receptacles. Establishment must have outside receptacles for the removal of trash. Receptacles must be on an area that constructed of nonabsorbent material such as concrete or asphalt and must be smooth, durable, and sloped to drain. Receptacles must be kept covered. New Violation. Correct By: 08/19/2024

The floors throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Establishment is to clean droppings, dead flies, and debris throughout the facility. New Violation. Correct By: 08/19/2024

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the basement area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. Establishment is to clean cardboard and unnecessary items in basement. New Violation. Correct By: 08/26/2024
